docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-15-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608 (B) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-24-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-05-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JUSTIN CAPERS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-15-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-01-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPERS, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT MJM MANAGEMENT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-24-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-01-2015

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-15-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-15-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JUSTIN CAPERS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-15-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-04-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-15-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-15-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-05-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-17-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
